content: The first game between Ian Nepomniachtchi (with white pieces) and Magnus Carlsen for the World Chess Championship, today (11.26.2021), in Dubai, ended in a draw.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by carlosalberto (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: ita:Il pareggio è stato il risultato del primo match tra Ian Nepomniachtchi (con i pezzi bianchi) e Magnus Carlsen per il Wo
